case_title: ILYA BERIN VS. LEGION CORPORATION, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERIN, ILYA AS TO DEFENDANT LEGION CORPORATION, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
